name: buxibuxi--chairman-daily-brief
description: Exclusive morning and evening briefing skill for listed company chairmen. Provides daily briefings from an executive decision-making perspective, covering stock price movements, industry policy updates, competitor intelligence, capital market sentiment, and regulatory announcement alerts. Morning briefings focus on pre-market outlook and risk warnings; evening briefings emphasize post-market review and next-day strategies. Data aggregated from multiple QVeris sources.
